strategy: Every helpful Charm you cast hands it a +45% Balanceblade and a Tower Shield, so keep your blading minimal and enchant single blades for efficiency.
It is stunable and beguilable, so a stun or beguile buys you safe setup Rounds.
It resists Balance 51% and other schools 21% but takes 30% more from Myth, Life, and Death, so bring one of those.
Hit soon after buffing so it cannot pile up Balanceblades and Towers.
cheatNotes: Any helpful Charm you or a mob casts makes it give itself a +45% Balanceblade and a Tower Shield.
